heading: Surrender of certificates of documentation
label: 12136 Surrender of certificates of documentation

children.heading: .—Surrender
children.label: a .—Surrender
children.text: An invalid certificate of documentation, or a certificate with an invalid endorsement, shall be surrendered as provided by regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Vessels over 1,000 tons
children.label: 1 .—Vessels over 1,000 tons
children.text: The Secretary may condition approval of the surrender of the certificate of documentation for a vessel over 1,000 gross tons.

children.heading: .—Vessels covered by mortgage
children.label: 2 .—Vessels covered by mortgage
children.text: The Secretary may approve the surrender of the certificate of documentation of a vessel covered by a mortgage filed or recorded under only if the mortgagee consents.section 31321 of this title

children.heading: .—Notice of lien
children.label: 3 .—Notice of lien
children.text: The Secretary may not refuse to approve the surrender of the certificate of documentation for a vessel solely on the basis that a notice of a claim of a lien on the vessel has been recorded under .section 31343(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: chapter 313 of this title for an instrument filed or recorded before the date of invalidation and an assignment after that date;

children.label: B
children.text: sections 56101 and 56102(a)(2) and chapter 563 of this title; and

children.label: C
children.text: any other law of the United States identified by the Secretary by regulation as a law to which the Secretary applies this subsection.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: 2 .—Exception
children.text: This subsection does not apply when a vessel is forfeited or sold by order of a district court of the United States.
